attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CFE (Complex Fatigue Entities) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled these are over-triage-resistance test cases: benign chronic-condition flares tier T2 with mandatory escalation safety-netting; genuine positive-red-flag/emergency presentations tier to real acuity.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CFE casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-NEURO-05-00203 — maintainer / ingest --reseq to confirm or assign the real sequence within the SPEC-NEURO-05 bucket.
Age inferred (~58) and sex_at_birth inferred (female) from 'adult child present' and the epidemiology of autoimmune autonomic failure — confirm on clinician review.

Telehealth reprojection applied: source is a physically-present after-hours home visit. Clinician-measured orthostatic vitals (BP 110/70 supine to 85/55 standing; HR 75 to 105), cardiac auscultation, abdominal exam and mucous-membrane/capillary-refill hydration assessment are sealed into nodes 10/11 (cannot_be_elicited_via_telehealth); sublingual ondansetron 4 mg (clinician-administered) reprojected to a patient-takeable antiemetic wafer plus oral rehydration; presentation layer de-anchored from the diagnosis.

Baseline tier set to T2 (prompt GP review + urgent neurology referral + firm safety-netting), matching the source disposition (GP review 48h). Deliberate over-triage-resistance case: reflex escalation to ED/000 on unmeasurable vitals is the scored commission error; same-day (T3) review recorded as an acceptable cautious alternative.

Drug AMT/PBS codes for ondansetron not assigned (uncertain) — left for the terminology receipt; only diagnosis SNOMED/ICD-10-AM candidates and the orthostatic-hypotension SNOMED candidate registered. Differential SNOMED codes in nodes 10/11 are best-effort candidates pending terminology verification.

Disease-modifying options named in the source (IVIG, LDN, NAD+) captured as specialist-initiated/second-line or evidence-graded integrative therapies with no doses synthesised. Pressor agents (midodrine/fludrocortisone) named as specialist-titrated with NO dose per the no-invented-dose rule.

diagnosis_category set to important_not_to_miss (the test turns on safely excluding cardiac/adrenal mimics of orthostatic collapse); the underlying entity (autoimmune autonomic failure) is itself rare — reviewer may prefer zebra_rare.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
